case_title: CHARYN, RON VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNI RAILWAY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY CHARYN, RON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNI RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
